entry.title: Re: Need help implement logic in CPI Mapping
entry.content:
If the index is based on each IDoc in your list, then you would want to setup a mapping with IDOC as the source that utilizes the index function.  Depending on how your target structure is aligned you may need to use splitByValue along with index.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Removing Translate Manually for Standard recordings
entry.content: Thanks Shane...saved me bunch of work! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Knowledge Sharing across the Globe - Part 2: How Does the SAP AppHaus EA Community Collaborate?
entry.content:
Thanks so much for your detailed feedback, @TobiA!

We appreciate that you have taken your time to give us details on your experiences and views. And we very much regret that one of the offered feedback channels did not work for you. Your input will certainly serve as a source for improvement, rest assured.

Now, to start working together, please help us improve and be so kind to send your email address or other contact details to our SAP AppHaus email address apphaus@sap.com. That way we will be able to involve the right colleagues and start a collaborative and constructive dialogue between you and the AppHaus team.

Again, thanks a lot and all the best!

entry.title: Re: I am not able to find " Integration_Provisioner " Rol...
entry.content: The visible Role Collections depend on the current "level" you are on. You first need to enter into your Trial subaccount and after that you can assign the Role Collection.

entry.title: Re: get property (not property values) from selection pos...
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, getResultMember will return description and id of values but not the dimension itself. However, I found another solution: instead of an dimension input filter I will use a dropdown. With that I can directly get current dimension with Chart_1.getDimensions(Feed.CategoryAxis) or get selected key from dropdown. [when using a dimension input filter on a chart then .getDimensions() results in an empty array). Thank you for your help. br edgar

entry.title: Re: smartform - suppress print dialog (It's not NO_DIALOG issue)
entry.content:
Hi,

this is the windows / client popup and not the SAP popup for printer selection. Has nothing to do with Smartforms.

This is maintained in SPAD. If you add __DEFAULT tho the Host Printer - then the local Popup should not appear - and the default printer is used.

Regards, Johann

entry.title: Business data reconciliation using DTV tool
entry.content:
If you are planning for System Conversion or SAP S/4HANA update/upgrade and business data reconciliation or validation is in your mind, then, this blog would be interesting for you. With some minimum configuration, DTV tool offers automatic validation of set of specific SAP reports and transactions along with custom reports (custom reports of ALV output type) in the source and target system state quickly and accurately.

DTV Tool 

DTV is a data comparison and validation tool from SAP which can be leveraged to reconcile huge amounts of business data before and after System Conversion and in SAP S/4HANA update/upgrade scenarios. Simply put, the tool can validate the extraction results of two snapshots. 

DTV Tool Highlights 

Availability  

DTV tool is generally available and included in the standard license. The tool is delivered as part of SAP BASIS component in S/4HANA systems. TCI implementation is needed in the case of ERP system. More information can be found in DTV Central Note 

3117879 - Data Transition Validation DTV Tool - Central Note - SAP for Me 

Scenarios 

At this moment DTV can validate or reconcile business data in 2 scenarios 

  • System conversion to SAP S/4HANA 2021 (and higher)​ 
  • Upgrade to SAP S/4HANA 1809 (and higher)

DTV Scope 

The tool can validate specific SAP reports and transactions (known as pre-delivered content) and custom reports with ALV output can also be validated starting DTV 1.4 release. 

Pre-delivered Content 

Pre-delivered contents are sets of SAP reports and transactions for which validation can be performed using DTV tool. Pre-delivered content comes by default along with the DTV installation. It includes reports from different functional areas such as  

  • Asset Accounting 
  • Financial Accounting
  • Material Management
  • Plant Maintenance
  • Production Planning
  • Warehouse Management 

The contents get updated (support for additional SAP reports and transactions) in regular interval and users can update the pre-delivered content by just importing the xml attached to SAP Note 

3258383 - DTV : SAP Pre- delivered Content - SAP for Me 

Custom Report validation   

DTV tool can validate custom reports (Z Reports) with ALV output from DTV 1.4 onwards. More details can be found in the blog post. 

Business Data Validation of Custom Reports using D... - SAP Community

Benefits

  • The tool can validate huge amount of business data automatically with minimum configuration. 
  • The tool is included in the standard license and easily available. 
  • No additional system is required for validation. 
  • Pre-delivered content offers SAP recommended tests. 
  • Custom reports with ALV outputs are supported for validation. (DTV 1.4 onwards)

DTV Tool Implementation 

DTV tool implementation has two parts. In the first part, most of the DTV configuration and 1st data extraction are done in the source system state during the SUM uptime. In the 2nd part, some configuration, 2nd data extraction and data comparison are done in the target system state post conversion or upgrade activities.

Source System configurations.

In case of system conversion, the source system is the SAP ECC system, and the target system is SAP S/4HANA system. In case of SAP S/4HANA upgrade/update, the source system is SAP S/4HANA current release and target is the SAP S/4HANA release that you want to upgrade to.  

Create project.

Execute transaction code DTV in the source system. Give a project ID and click on Create. 

In the Manage Project screen provide the project name. A project name is obligatory. You can also notice the different steps available for the project in the below screenshot. 

Maintain System

In the Manage Project Screen double click on “Maintain Systems” and provide details about the source and target system. 

In the Maintain System step specify the systems you want to participate in validation using the Create button. In case of conversion specify SAP ECC as the source and SAP S/4HANA as the target release. You can provide details about the application server and define the number of work processes that would be used during DTV execution such as Simulation, Extraction and Evaluation etc. 

Pre-delivered Content

Pre-delivered contents are a set of SAP reports for which validation can be performed. Import XML button is used for updating the latest reports to the system. Please check the pre-delivered content section of this blog for more details. 

Select one or multiple SAP Reports as per the validation requirement and click on Import Specification. 

For successful validation it is important for customers to understand the scope of the validation. This means, which all reports customers would like to validate and whether DTV can validate those reports and plan accordingly. It is important to note that DTV can validate SAP reports which are part of pre-delivered content and custom reports of ALV output type. 

In the above screenshot I have added five reports from the Pre-delivered Content. 

Project Global Data

In the Project Global Data, you can define the data to be used for data extraction in the test specification. The project global data will be available for all the reports in the test specification and can be used for data extraction as needed. Some examples of project global data are Company Code, Profit Center, Cost Center etc. 

Some of these global data comes by default along with the tool, but new project global data can also be created using the Create button. You can find an example below in which I have added project global data. 

Define Test Specification

Define Test Specification for each Report by double clicking on the Report Name. In details screen you can provide Split, Condition, Exclude and Variant (If any) as relevant for the report.

Split: Split is the granularity at which the data is extracted and compared. 

Condition: Input parameter for the report execution. 

Exclude: Specify fields that would be excluded from the validation. 

Variant: Specify variant for the report if you have any. 

Output Keys: you can view the keys using which the source and the target data are compared in the evaluation. 

For Custom report validation, please check the below blog. 

Business Data Validation of Custom Reports using D... - SAP Community 

Simulation

Simulation is an optional but a recommended step in Data Transition Validation (DTV) tool which can be leveraged to check if the extraction will be successful with the input parameters that has been provided in the “Define Test Specification” step. 

As an example, in the following screenshot I have run the simulation for the report RFITEMGL. 

Please check the blog for more details about this step

Simulation made easy in DTV 1.4 - SAP Community

Execute Data Extraction  

In the data extraction screen, select the report and click on Run Selected to execute the extraction, alternatively you can also Import Simulation Results if simulation is executed for the report. 

In the screenshot below, Run Selected and Import Simulation Results buttons are highlighted. You can use the Run Selected option to extract data in case you have not run the simulation. If you have run the simulation, import the extraction results using the Import Simulation Results button. 

The fetched records can be seen in the Result tab. 

After this step, the source system is ready for downtime. So basically, you can create the project, maintain the system, define the test specification and run the simulation during SUM uptime to save time and run the 1st data extraction before the technical downtime. The project created in the source system will be available as it is in the target system. The next step is Target system configuration. 

Target System Configuration

Post the activity (conversion or upgrade), in the target system state, execute transaction DTV and provide the same Project ID created in the source system state. 

Define Test Specification 

In the Define Test Specification provide the parameters for the target system report extraction. You must make sure to specify the same extraction parameters as the source system. 

You have the possibility to check the parameters that had been provided in the source system by selecting the drop-down Source. 

Note: To reduce the downtime during the productive run, you can define the target system Test Specification parameters during the source system Test Specification configuration itself by simply choosing the system as TARGET. 

Simulation 

You can follow the same steps as defined in the Simulation section of the Source System configuration in this blog and execute simulation. 

Data Extraction 

Now data can also be extracted from the target system following same steps as mentioned in the Data Extraction step of source system configuration in this blog. In the following screenshot you can see the total number of records fetched in the target.

Evaluation 

Once the extraction is complete for the reports in the target system, evaluation can be triggered. Evaluation step is performed exclusively in the target system. 

The result is being evaluated in terms of 4 different parameters. 

  • DIFFERENCE: Number of records that are not matched in source and target. 
  • EQUAL: Number of records that are found exactly matching in source and target. 
  • MISSING_IN_TARGET: Number of records that are present in source but missing in target. 
  • UNEXPECTED_IN_TARGET: Number of records that are found in target but are missing in source.

 

Evaluation Summary 

In the Evaluation Summary screen, you can get the holistic view of all the reports that have been evaluated to check the correctness of the converted or upgraded system. 

I hope this blog will help you in your DTV implementation journey.

entry.title: How can we create a FORM using SAP Adobe Forms BTP from a S4 HANA onPrem system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are having a requirement to use the SAP Forms Adobe Service on BTP and consume it in the S4 HANA on Premise System using a ABAP program to call the form using the below architecture

https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/configure-sap-forms-service-in-s-4hana-on-premise-systems

Thanks

Hello Community, 

Can you please share with me the best way to manage displayed item in SAP MM?

entry.title: Q&A collection for program BUPTDTRANSMIT
entry.content:
It is noticed that job for report BUPTDTRANSMIT processing was not completed but occupies the process.

The reason of this symptom:

Number of entries in table BUT_TDTRANS were high. The time taken to execute is directly proportional to the number of entries in the table BUT_TDTRANS.

How to solve this symptom:

1.Reduce the number of entries in BUT_TDTRANS table.

To reduce the number of entries in BUT_TDTRANS table. You need to schedule a background job (daily) for report BUPTDTRANSMIT giving a package size such as (500/1000). While it is running keep a check on the BUT_TDTRANS table if the count is decreasing or not.

To reduce the number of entries in BUT_TDTRANS table, you need to create report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT according to note 2151842 - BUPTDTRANSMIT performance problem from but000_swap and outbound and run it instead of BUPTDTRANSMIT. The report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT is used just once to get the data aligned. You need to execute this report only once. After this the entries in BUT_TDTRANS will get reduced, that is, all the data for till the current date will be distributed to the applications. Afterwards the "normal" report BUPTDTRANSMIT can be used again. 

2.Note needs to be implemented in your system 

SAP note 3200572 - To correct the standard report BUPTDTRANSMIT. This Note will make the data run in parallel processing which will enhance the performance.

Other questions:

How does this report BUPTDTRANSMIT work?

All the records that have become valid in the meantime are determined from table BUT_TDTRANS and are read subsequently together with the table key of the respective business partner tables. The records that are marked as containing errors by at least one application, are recorded application-specifically in the table BUT_TDMISS. Only when a record has been distributed successfully to all applications is it deleted from the table BUT_TDTRANS (and if necessary, also from BUT_TDMISS). The date of the last erroneous and the last successful BUPTDTRANSMIT run is recorded subsequently in table BUT_TDAPPLI for each application. This date should be updated daily as the report is meant to run on a daily basis.

When can run report BUPTDTRANSMIT

This report is meant to run on a daily basis. You can run this report in any hour where there are no other jobs running such that it doesn't affect the CPU memory.

Why the number of entries in table BUT_TDTRANS were high? 

The number of entries were high because the data was not distributed in timely manner. It is always recommended to run the background job for the report BUPTDTRANSMIT on a daily basis. So that the number of entries will no increase and the data is distributed consistently.

Is it normal that the data continue to increase? It may happen again in the future, is it necessary to do this every time it happens?

You need to schedule a background job for BUPTDTRANSMIT report. Then, as this will be running daily, this issue will not occur.

Is it correct that the number of entries of the table BUT_TDTRANS becomes 0?

Not really. After you execute the report, the entries in BUT_TDTRANS table will get reduced, that is, all the data for till the current date will be distributed to the applications. The data for the future dates will still be there.

Further question about report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT:

  • How to create report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT
    See How to create report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT

  • Would running report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT have any impact on the system?
    It will have no negative impact. The report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT is used just once to get the data aligned. Afterwards the "normal" report can be used again.

  • How do I check the behavior/result of report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT after execution?
    You can check the entries in table BUT_TDTRANS.

  • Will it cause any problem to run report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT in a development/verification environment that is currently working properly?
    No. But, there is no need to run the report if its working properly.

Best regards

Sherry

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Show Popup after O...
entry.content: It worked perfectly. Thanks a lot Nikhil.

entry.title: Re: Accessing SAP Cloud Platform via AWS Direct Connect
entry.content:
Dear Jana,

Thank you so much for your blog.

I have few questions.
My client wants to connect to SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere from their closed network using AWS Direct Connect Public VIF.
I understand that customer needs to prepare and set up AWS account for the Public VIF, but is there any specific requirements that must be configured with a Public VIF? (e.g. specific components, architecture, etc.)
Also, I believe there should be some information we need to share from customer side to SAC/DSP, and vice-versa. (e.g. IP address)
Is there any Notes or help link with more details on how to setup a Public VIF?

Best Regards,
Moeka Horiguchi

entry.title: How to restrict Fluid type in TCode IFCU
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

       In Vehicle Technology tab, Primary Fuel was maintained as Diesel(No secondary maintained).

     While entering consumption in Tcode IFCU, Fluid type Petrol was taken and consumption was posted.

   To avoid the above scenario, Is there a configuration that prevents the system from taking into account fluid kinds other than those specified in the primary fuel while executing TCode : IFCU?

 

Thanks & regards,

Sandeep.Butti

entry.title: Release strategy for po
entry.content: How to add restrictions on L1 level approver not to approve L2 level release in SAP S4 HANA ?

entry.title: Re: How to Transport Workflows configured using Manage Wo...
entry.content:
One of the "selling points" of flexible workflow is that the dependency on developers is reduced and the business process experts can define the approval process. 

I think it is part of the concept that the configuration done in "Manage Workflows" is done in production and not transported from development. Not necessarily because you can't do that for go-live, more because you don't want to do that when someone wants to either change the process or add one or more processes for specific scenarios. 

Note the "I think" here. We're still only in the Q system in our implementation project, but I haven't found a way to transport or export the configured processes from our development system.
Can someone please bring back Alan (former_member181875) from his retirement so we can get solid answers 🙂

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub: Map custom Attribute Types t...
entry.content:
Hello there!

We do, in fact, plan to allow the mapping of custom attributes to a job role. We'd love to get that in the plan for this year, but there's a solid chance that this will not make it into the product until 2025. 

Yours, 

Rebecca Reagan-Thieme

entry.title: Re: Do you know how to find the IDOC number of a vendor invoice?
entry.content:
Alternativetly, in SE16 you can follow the below: 

1. search for table SRRELROLES and enter the data 
OBJKEY: invoice number no+fiscal year
OBJTYPE: BUS2081

2. Copy the ROLEID

3. in Table IDOCREL, search for that role from step 2 in the field ROLE_B

4. Copy ROLE_A value

5. Back in table SRRELROLES  enter the copied ROLE_A from step 4 into field ROLEID

IDoc number will be found

entry.title: Re: the create function does not working by using (business API) in RAP application
entry.content:
well it finally works, here what i did:

CLASS zcl_09_call_bapi_k DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS call_bapi.

PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_09_call_bapi_k IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD call_bapi.
DATA: ls_notifheader TYPE bapi2080_nothdri,
lt_return TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
lt_notitem TYPE TABLE OF bapi2080_notitemi,
lv_notif_type TYPE qmart,
lv_notification_key TYPE qmnum. " Add this variable
* lt_number TYPE qmnum.

* ls_notifheader-notif_date = 'Q1'. " Notification types
* ls_notifheader-short_text = 'Test notification'. " Short text for the notification
* ls_notifheader-funct_loc = '1000'. " Functional location
*
lv_notif_type = 'Y8'.
DATA:ls_new_notification_header type bapi2080_nothdre.
TRY.
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ALM_NOTIF_CREATE'
EXPORTING
notifheader = ls_notifheader
notif_type = lv_notif_type
IMPORTING
notifheader_export = ls_new_notification_header
TABLES
notitem = lt_notitem
return = lt_return.

IF lt_return IS INITIAL.
WRITE: / 'Notification created successfully.'.
" Save the notification data
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ALM_NOTIF_SAVE'
EXPORTING
number = ls_new_notification_header-notif_no
IMPORTING
notifheader = ls_new_notification_header
TABLES
return = lt_return.

" Store the notification key
lv_notification_key = ls_new_notification_header-notif_no.
WRITE: / 'Notification key:', lv_notification_key.

ELSE.
LOOP AT lt_return INTO DATA(ls_message).
IF ls_message-type = 'E' OR ls_message-type = 'A'.
" Handle error or abort message
WRITE: / 'Error type:', ls_message-type, ', Error:', ls_message-message.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_param_missing INTO DATA(lx_param_missing).
" Handle the exception
WRITE: / 'Exception raised:', lx_param_missing->get_text( ).

CATCH cx_sy_itab_duplicate_key INTO DATA(lx_duplicate_KEY).
" Handle the exception
WRITE: / 'Exception raised:', lx_duplicate_KEY->get_text( ).

CATCH cx_sy_no_handler INTO DATA(lx_no_handler).
" Handle the exception
WRITE: / 'Exception raised:', lx_no_handler->get_text( ).

ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

 

but right now if i create a new data then i got an empty key:

is there any way that i could fill this empty key with unique value?

entry.title: QM Determine calculation input characteristic for calculated characteristic
entry.content: I'm learning QM and I'm trying to use BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS to programmatically record test results associated with an inspection lot. When I call the BAPI a subset of the test results fail to load because I am attempting to record a calculated characteristic using calculation input characteristics which are part of the same set of results and which have not yet been recorded. My question, how do I programmatically determine which calculation input characteristics are used by a specific calculated characteristic? I intend to filter out the calculation input characteristics, record those first using the BAPI...then go back and record results for the calculated characteristics.

entry.title: Transitioning from Software Engineering to SAP Consulting
entry.content: I'm a software engineer with 5 years' experience. I've decided to change careers and become an SAP consultant. So I need the roadmaps to achieve this goal.

entry.title: Custom fields in BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD
entry.content:
Business has implemented the Badi BADI_MAT_CUST_SCR for extension of components in CJ20N.  This works fine, but there is a customer-specific process for creating Networks, activities and assign components.  In this process, BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD is used to assign components.

How to include the custom fields via BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD ?

These fields are saving in RSADD table.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom fields in BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD
entry.content:
I checked the latest version of the BAPI and no EXTENSIONIN exists. That means there is no possibility in BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD to include custom fields (structure: EXTENSIONIN).

Adding custom fields is restricted to only Project structure objects (Network, Project definition, Activity etc.), it is not available to integration functionality (material, sales order, … ).

As the requested functionality is not currently contained in the standard software, we can only suggest that you consider raising this requirement as a suggestion within the SAP Continuous Influence program (see SAP Note 11 about how to proceed). This program provides an efficient way to integrate customer feedback into future development.

Jarna

entry.title: SOST: "Cannot process message; maximum size exceeded" XS850 error SAP_BASIS 740 SP27
entry.content:
Hello, 
i was looking for solution but the notes 1171138 are not valid for my version SAP_BASIS 7.4 SP 27
so i was left with the solution to config the parameters mpi/total_size_MB but is current value is 170 so how is it that my limit is 43,000,000 bytes?
where is it maintaing the limition of the message in sap connect?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Updates take some time to reflect?
entry.content:
Hi @David_Oexner,

The following product documentation clearly states that updates on this particular service instance will take at least 1h to get changes applied:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-service-instance-and-service-key-for-inbound-authentication#updating-service-instance

However, this is most likely an exception. Most service instances that do accept updates will get the changes right after they are applied.

Hope this helps,
Ivan

entry.title: How to create report ZBUPTDTRANSMIT
entry.content:
1. Goto transaction SE38.
  2. Enter ZBUPTDTRANSMIT in Program and click on create.
    Select Executable program in Type and click on Save.
  3. Select Local object.

    Now your report is created.

  4. Delete the existing text from the report.

     

  5. Paste the test from the attached text file in the note 2151842 - BUPTDTRANSMIT performance problem from but000_swap and outbound .

     

  6. Now click on Check and Activate. You can ignore the warnings.
  7. Now you can execute the report.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - empty rows in Table appea...

Thank you so much for the holistic answer, unfortunately i considered all your aspects in my analysis - i actually rebuilt all the stories since every single one of my approaches did not work - i am pretty sure this was a bug occuring by cloning stories and transporting them.

entry.title: How to extend a field from Product Master Data to Stock Overview ?
entry.content:
User is unable to extend any field created in a respective product's master data -> General tab to stock overview report via adaptation mode.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extend a field from Product Master Data to Sto...
entry.content:
Currently there is no extension scenario available to extend from product's master data to Stock overview report.

Refer Extension Scenarios | SAP Help Portal to know the areas in which extension fields are active and available.

entry.title: VMI Updates in Mass
entry.content: Hello! I apologize if this is not the correct board to post this in, but I am a data steward and we deal with turning the VMI flag off and on for vendors all the time. We have to do it manually one by one each time and it is time consuming. Does anyone know if there is a way to turn VMI flags on and off in mass at once?

entry.title: Re: SEN Bookpage Tracking
entry.content: This method (Percent Completed) has been used during assignment creation

entry.title: Issue with API Endpoint Path with a DOT "."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

When constructing API request URLs with endpoint paths like "/Folder.Create", the "Folder" part of the endpoint is being stripped from the URL upon making the API call. In fact, everything that precedes a dot "." gets omitted.

For example, "/Folder.Create?" becomes "/Create?"

URL used in the API call: '/Folder.Create?'

The returned URL from the call: '/Create?'

Code:

Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search value not updated in Table
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search value not updated in Table
entry.content: Was this question ever resolved? I am facing the same issue....

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
Here is my week 1 submission.

 

{ "specversion": "1.0", "type": "com.nithesh.app.resource.created", "source": "/app/resources/2124587451", "id": "N214-5234-9856", "time": "2024-03-02T18:00:00Z", "datacontenttype": "application/json", "data": { "resourceId": "M93157232", "resourceName": "Nithesh Resource", "resourceType": "nithesh.com/resources" } }

entry.title: LMS Mobile App Offline Content Learning
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We tried to use download online content in our iOS device and to test the offline learning functionalities. We can successfully download the online content to our iOS device. But we have no idea how to launch the offline content. When the iOS devise (e.g. iPhone) is offline, we cannot open the iPhone to access our SF user profile. How can we access to the offline content then?

Does anyone have an idea how?

Thank you in advanced for sharing your experience!

Best regards,

Lik

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Question about email send out when copying class
entry.content:
Hi Guido,

I agree that checkbox is confusing. and It also sent out email notification which is not making sense. I am just wondering why the systemenrollment notification will be sent out like this....or if it is a system expected behaviors....

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1

  "type": "sap.s4.beh.purchaseorder.v1.PurchaseOrder.Created.v1",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "source": "https://s4.cloud/",
  "subject": "OR1234567890",
  "id": "QgEK7wzuHtqdhJwqCS+VOA==",
  "time": "2024-03-11T12:31:05Z",
  "data": {
    "PurchaseOrder": "1234567890"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

I have check the found tables, by checking which ones contains entries:

select 'CRMS4D_REC_MAP' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "CRMS4D_REC_MAP");
select 'CRMS4M_ICM_DOC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "CRMS4M_ICM_DOC");
select 'CVSE_GUID' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "CVSE_GUID");
select 'DMS_DOC_FOLDER3' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DMS_DOC_FOLDER3");
select 'DMUD' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DMUD");
select 'DRAD_DRAFT' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DRAD_DRAFT");
select 'DRAD' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DRAD");
select 'DRAD_LAST_CHANGE' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DRAD_LAST_CHANGE");
select 'DRAD_PORDER' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "DRAD_PORDER");
select 'JVA_FILE_LOG' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "JVA_FILE_LOG");
select 'KNA1_DRAD_DQ_RES' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "KNA1_DRAD_DQ_RES");
select 'KNA1_DRAD_PRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "KNA1_DRAD_PRC");
select 'KNA1_DRAD_SRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "KNA1_DRAD_SRC");
select 'LFA1_DRAD_DQ_RES' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "LFA1_DRAD_DQ_RES");
select 'LFA1_DRAD_PRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "LFA1_DRAD_PRC");
select 'LFA1_DRAD_SRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "LFA1_DRAD_SRC");
select 'MAINTNOTIF_D' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MAINTNOTIF_D");
select 'MAINTNTF_D' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MAINTNTF_D");
select 'MAINTWORKREQ_D' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MAINTWORKREQ_D");
select 'MARA_DRAD_DQ_RES' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_DQ_RES");
select 'MARA_DRAD' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD");
select 'MARA_DRAD_PRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_PRC");
select 'MARA_DRAD_SRC' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_SRC");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXH' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXH");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXH_P' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXH_P");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXH_S' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXH_S");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXL' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXL");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXL_P' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXL_P");
select 'MARA_DRAD_STXL_S' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "MARA_DRAD_STXL_S");
select 'ODATA_CV_ATTACH' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "ODATA_CV_ATTACH");
select '/PLMI/CR_DYNTHN' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "/PLMI/CR_DYNTHN");
select 'RDSV_OUT_COPY' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "RDSV_OUT_COPY");
select 'SIPT_PRINT_CHK' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "SIPT_PRINT_CHK");
select '/SMERP/STG_PM005' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "/SMERP/STG_PM005");
select '/SMERP/STG_PM010' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "/SMERP/STG_PM010");
select 'STKO_DRAFT_V2' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "STKO_DRAFT_V2");
select 'STPO_DRAFT_V2' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "STPO_DRAFT_V2");
select 'VEERP_LINKS' from dummy where 0!=(select count(*) from "VEERP_LINKS");

By the way, in my S4 system there is no /KPC/MM_APDO table.

 

Only 4 tables contain entries:
 - DRAD and DRAD_LAST_CHANGE contains information for the same LOIO.
 - /PLMI/CR_DYNTHN does not contain relevant information
 - ODATA_CV_ATTACH contains a single entry

Therefore there is one entry that is considered temporary, which I do not know the exact meaning.
Would you know what is the meaning of an "attachment serviced" in temporary status?

Would you know how I could investigate for the other documents that are not in these tables?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: ExcelTransformBean Part 2: Convert simple XML to various Excel formats easily
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for this utility tool. Its amazing and saves a ton of time. I was wondering if it can generate excel with number values as numbers and not as text.

Thanks for your help!

Br,

Jyoti

entry.title: Abrir Crystal Report desde SAP B1
entry.content:
Estimados nos migramos a un nuevo servidor en la nuve, ahora cuando intento ir a modificar un diseño la opción me aparece en gris,

Además, cuando voy a Gestión de informes y diseño selecciono y doy editar me arroja error sin contenido. Ahora cuando exporto el diseño lo abro sin problema en crystal report ingresando cadena de conexión.

entry.title: FMS not working correctly
entry.content:
Hello Experts,


I have created an FMS to populated a UDF at row level in Purchase Order from a UDF in Item Master Data. Auto-refresh is set to REGULARLY on EXITING ALTERED COLUMN. The FMS works correctly and I am able to see the UDF getting populated at Purchase Order row level. However, the issue is that the value at backend table is not getting updated and is showing the old value only. Please help.

Best Regards,

Abhishek.

entry.title: Re: How can get project POC overview
entry.content: Use CNE5 and bring in the non-aggregated and aggregated POC values.

entry.title: Re: Right to enable "Events to trigger on completion"
entry.content:
umm can you help me with the step "Under Applications >> Central Management Console, turn on the option to be able to customize or limit options in the CMC"?

 

I'm checking how to achieve this...

In CMC Tab Access Configuration looks like this to me, and Im Administrator

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP world!
entry.content: Nice to meet you too!

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP world!
entry.content: Hi Maryia, Nice to meet you in SAP world!)

entry.title: configuration document & SAP notes
entry.content:
Need guidance on std configuration documents for particular topics and relevant guidance on SAP Note.

i have s-user id plz give me guidance

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi @ramco1917 ,

What do you mean by able to resend? From where the user is capable of re-raise the same document for approval? Could you please provide more details or screenshots to demonstrate?

Thanks,
Felipe

entry.title: Fiori elements SEGW, when user selects the select all button, it only selects the data on page
entry.content:
Good day

We are using a Fiori elements app with SEGW oData get entityset in the backend, when a user selects the select all button on Fiori, it only selects the data on the page, as the user clicks on load more the new data that shows is not selected. The user wants to select all the data and do a posing.

.

As the user scrolls down, new data is loaded as unselected and the select all button is automatically unticked

entry.title: Re: Vendor master data
entry.content:
Customizing / SPRO : Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable, Supplier Accounts, Master Data, Preparations for Creating Supplier Master Data.

Look for one of 

  • Define Account Groups with Screen Layout (Vendors)
  • Define Screen Layout per Company Code (Vendors)
  • Define Screen Layout per Activity (Vendors)

entry.title: Re: Raise in Standard Report causing background Dumps
entry.content:
Provide more information (which report)

I can only guess this program isn't allowed in background (requires a GUI session ?)

entry.title: Re: Migration from Service Catalog to SAP BTP Service Operator
entry.content: All the Existing running courses are documents are still not updated with this information on kyma.

entry.title: Re: EF Core 6 with Hana client 2.18 throw error "HanaExce...
entry.content:
I also failed at the tutorial, but after hours of analysis and reflection I was able to find a solution.
After I filled the value "CurrentSchema" in the ConnectionString accordingly, it worked.

https://github.com/sap-tutorials/Tutorials/issues/23474

entry.title: Re: SAP PPPI Material quantity calculation?
entry.content:
Hello

When I mentioned that you can see the information in the BOM, I mean that you can enter the master recipe transaction and find the MCQ data at the component level. 

If you want to read the information from the database, you need to use the tables mentioned in my previous reply. 
You can also take a look into function modules CO_ML_MR_CALCULATION_SHEET and KALT_READ_FROM_DB for more details.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office SAPGETDATA function with +NodeKey...
entry.content:
hello,

from my experience, single quotes are redundant.

=@SAPGetData("DS_1"|"Amount"|"0GL_ACCOUNT+NodeKey(NodeTypeName)=HFSV11")

 

even this should work
=@SAPGetData("DS_1"|"Amount"|"0GL_ACCOUNT+NodeKey(NodeTypeName)="&A8)

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: "CALL TRANSACTION 'VL33N' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN" some...
entry.content:
VL33N is intended for inbound delivery, maybe you call it with wrong or initial delivery number (eg. click on a total line) or wrong delivery type ?

Add some checks such as SY-SUBRC after READ TABLE.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello!
My name is Rene, I am delighted to join this community and interact with you!
I wish to discuss basic process analyses, especially SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition.
Kindest regards
Rene

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content: Hi , if Document has been approved user should not be able to send it again.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am excited to learn SAP and would like take the opportunity of the great initiative for a Free SAP Certification Exam attempt. I would like to learn and certify SAP MM and I am a holder of Honours Degree in Marketing.

Regards,

Janny

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content: What version of SQL Server are you trying to connect to?

entry.title: Sticky table header in Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud experts

I have a table in a story that exceeds the height of the widget size I use.

The thing is that when I scroll down to see more data, the header disappears and I would like to know if there is any option to make the header sticky and keep it at the top even if I lower the scroll bar.

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Re: Javascript API (getMembers, getMember...) not longer working on Version Dimension
entry.content: JefB, the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3397906 remains the authoritative source of any changes to this code. I will reach out to the KBA owner to ask if they can check with development to see if there is a plan to change this code again in the next few updates.

entry.title: Re: Raise in Standard Report causing background Dumps
entry.content: yes GUI Session .

entry.title: Re: with PrincipalPropagtion and cloud connector Mobile s...
entry.content: If it is prompting you for authentication again that typically means the principal propagation is not correctly configured end to end. That could be the cause of the error. I would recommend reviewing your configuration to confirm

entry.title: Data Retention Management of Offboarded Employees
entry.content:
Hello, Community -
I would like to ask after you offboard your employee, how do you/other companies handle the list of former employees after the GDPR period and manage their alumni? Can we keep only selected fields?
Regards,
Adi
 
SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello, I identify as a person in the below categories: Military Veteran. Please send me the information I need to get started on my SAP education path.

Best,

Charles

entry.title: Re: SAP_WFRT user as approver in workflow
entry.content: Please deleted this... #duplicated

entry.title: Re: SAP_WFRT user as approver in workflow
entry.content:
Hi Lisa,

From your reply, it looks like a sloppy approach from SAP.

  • Why is the sy-uname replaced by SAP_WFRT? When the actual approver's user ID is available in records, what's the fancy need to change it to a generic user?
  • Also, showing a default tcode like ME29N is only misleading as many end users would be confused with that. If nothing else, you could atleast hardcode a value like "FlexWF" or something.

#mytwocents

entry.title: Re: Table support within forms in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hey @Manuel_Namyslo 

Any advice how this could be solved? Many thanks. Max

entry.title: Re: How should SAP embrace SAP AI?
entry.content:
Hi @zhangxiao123 
Thank you for posting this question inour SAP Learning Group.

We have a dedicated Joule SAP Community topic page  where you can get to know Joule, SAP’s generative AI copilot, revolutionizing how you interact day-to-day with SAP business systems in a secure and compliant way. 

Please also join the AI/ML Group on SAP Community and Interact with AI Enthusiasts new group this is teh perfect place to join peers and experts to discuss advances in AI, use cases developed by SAP, and explore the limitless possibilities of AI built for businesses. 

Kind regaqrds
Margit

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content: Yes, I got it. I meant how and from where the users are doing it? Describing their steps might help on finding a solution. Thanks

entry.title: How to add custom drop down field to LMS learning history completion
entry.content: Our administrators are looking at recording the reason why people have received failure status for classes (i.e. adding a reason field when they record learning completions history).  They don't want to record using the comment field because it's free text and everyone will have a different wording for the reason, which makes it impossible to report later and tally up the reasons.  They want to add a custom drop down list of reasons that they can select from.  Is there any way to achieve this? Any kind of workaround if this cannot be done?

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Automation - RDP Manager Mode not working
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I'm also facing the similar problem. Could you please tell how to configure the "RDP" session. Do we need to have a two separate agent in the two diff. servers (one with RDP activated and another one with Unattended Mode. And then assign both of the agent in the specific environment)?

entry.title: Re: FMS not working correctly
entry.content: Can you send screen captures of the issue ?

entry.title: Originals can not be selected in tco. CV03n
entry.content:
Hello

After the conversion to S/4HANA we are facing an issue in tco. CV03n, when working on a small screen or in a small window. Due to the fact that the subcreens for Document Data und Superior Document are nor resizable, it happens that the Originals are no longer displayed. Even the scrollbar for the Originals section is hidden. Please see the attached print screen.

Is there a chance to fix that so the users can find and display all relevant documents?

Regards, Markus

entry.title: Re: Change ekko-zterm in ME21N/ME22N
entry.content:
Former Member are usually no longuer active on the forum.

You can apply their solution, but don't use an export/import, better set an instance attribute of your implementing class so you only clear the field once.

entry.title: Re: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content:
Thanks Prasoon. But the difference will still be there if you have quantity as 1 or 2 or 5.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: Replacement for Function CREDIT_EXPOSURE
entry.content:
I'm looking for the replacement function for CREDIT_EXPOSURE in SAP HANA Systems, where CREDIT_EXPOSURE still reads from the old tables. 
UKM_MALUSLIST_PROCESSING looks promising and provides some data, but misses OPEN_* return parameters.
Any hints or strategies how to find them appreciated.

entry.title: Re: C_HANATEC_19 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - S...
entry.content:
Hi @venkat_vamsi 
Please access our Get your SAP Certifications ready for tomorrow’s world page where you can find the information what is changing. 

To understand how your certification will be affected with the upcoming SAP Certification program changes and what you will need to do to stay certified please open the SAP Certification Recommendation  documentation.  
The C_HANATEC SAP Certified Technology Associate – SAP HANA 2.0 will retire on 2024-03-28* Recommendation for recertification:
C_HANATEC will be renamed to C_HDBADM (no re-certification required for those already certified in C_HANATEC). Certification C_DBADM will also cover topics currently part of C_HCADM. 
Therefore, C_HCADM will be retired.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Update Sales BOM master data
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm in SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud and I want you to ask if it's possible for you to create, in SAP BTP, an app that is able to, based on changes to a sales BOM in the sales order (for example, add or delete a sub-position), also modify the respective BOM master data by adding or deleting the modified positions in the sales order.

Kind regards,

Emanuele

entry.title: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi, for simulation, I noticed that the bubbles will automatically go to the middle for practice mode. However, for concurrent mode it will go to its respective position just like demo mode. Is there any method for the bubbles in practice mode to do the same besides manually positioning the bubbles?

demo mode:

practice mode:

concurrent mode:

entry.title: SAP EMS- Challenges in Using Batch jobs to update EMS status for CAN and EXP business event
entry.content:
Hello EMS experts, 

Our scenario is S4 subscription contract via CPI to EMS  record update .

we need some inputs on  the best way to handle Cancel the EMS record when  CPI is sending Cancel business event and end date of contract . 

In EMS,  end date is updating, but status is not getting update as CAN . Is there any code to add in Rule sets . If yes,  where and what to add to get desired status updates.

Thanks

Srinivas

entry.title: Automate the closing and opening of FI and MM periods in S/4 Hana
entry.content: Is there any standard way to automate the closing and opening of FI and MM periods in S/4 Hana?

entry.title: Re: SAP Web IDE Personal Edition How To: Add a new UI5 Version
entry.content:
Additional info: 
If you are using SAP WebIDE Personal edition,  JRE version 8 alone supports.
and on top if you have limitations to install .exe. As alternative, download zip file. 
https://www.oracle.com/sg/java/technologies/javase/javase8-archive-downloads.html#license-lightbox

Copy Downloaded JRE version and rename folder as "jre" as below. To run locally. remaning steps above are relevant. tested 1.96 SAP UI5 version and it works perfectly fine.

entry.title: Re: How to refresh ALV Data in SALV on Click Event.
entry.content: The code you have posted is still incomplete, inconsistent, and it doesn't compile. You display GT_TDRDISP but your refresh GT_FINAL. Sorry, I don't get it.
